page_content:
PHIL - Philosophy

PHIL408 Topics in Contemporary Philosophy (3 Credits)

An intensive examination of contemporary problems and issues. Source material will be selected from recent books and articles.

Repeatable to: 99 credits if content differs.

PHIL409 Advanced Studies in Contemporary Philosophy (3 Credits)

An in-depth study of a contemporary philosophical problem or issue. Topics will vary, but the course will encourage students to grapple

with the primary literature in order to generate sustained critical analyses or proposed resolutions of issues under active consideration in contemporary philosophy.
